title: eupatorium capillifolium var. leptophyllum
intro: Eupatorium capillifolium var. leptophyllum, also known as dog-fennel or white snakeroot, is a perennial plant that belongs to the aster family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic and antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Eupatorium capillifolium var. leptophyllum include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, headaches, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to promote wound healing and reduce pain. Eupatorium capillifolium var. leptophyllum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it due to its potential toxicity.
